title: National and provincial/territorial tobacco sales data 2021 - Canada.ca
content:
## National and provincial/territorial tobacco sales data 2021
Provincial/Territorial and National Sales Data for Cigarettes, Fine Cut Tobacco, Cigars, Pipe Tobacco, and Smokeless Tobacco from 2001-2021
- Fine-cut tobacco sales
- Smokeless tobacco sales
Organization: Health Canada
Division: Business Intelligence Division
